name: Taylor Potts
description:
!! WIP !!

"WHAT!? But the generic store brand just doesn’t have the same flavor profile!"

A dorky nerd who just so happens to be your club president and dorm room bestie.

This twink is a wannabe man with a plan, and boy does he want to catch a ghost tonight. There's no way in hell you're not going to be apart of it.

10/23/25: Added a 2nd dialogue option! It's way more detailed compared to the original. I'll hopefully update the first option soon.
creator: HotShotSk8rBoi
